back_translation: When Jesus had spoken these things, He lifted up His eyes to heaven and said, “O Father, the time has come. May Father grant Your Son to receive glory, so that the Son may offer glory to You.
Just as You gave the Son authority over all humanity, so that the Son would give eternal life to all whom You have entrusted to the Son.
And this is eternal life — that they may know You, the only true God, and know Jesus Christ, the One whom You have sent.
I have offered glory to You on earth, by accomplishing the royal work which You entrusted to Me to do, until it was completed.
And now, O Father, may You grant Me to receive glory in Your presence, with the glory that I had together with You before the creation of the world.
I have revealed Your name to those whom You have entrusted to Me out of the world. They were Yours, and You entrusted them to Me, and they have kept Your word.
Now they know that everything which You entrusted to Me comes from You.
For the words which You entrusted to Me, I have given them. They received them, and knew clearly that I came from You, and believed that You sent Me.
I pray for them. I do not pray for the world, but I pray for those whom You have entrusted to Me, because they are Yours.
Everything that is Mine is Yours, and everything that is Yours is Mine. And I have received glory in them.

I will no longer be in the world, but they are in the world, and I am about to come to You. O Holy Father, please protect them by Your name which You entrusted to Me, so that they may be one as You and I are one.

While I was with them, I protected them by Your name which You entrusted to Me, and I have guarded them. And not one of them perished, except the son of destruction, so that the Scripture would be fulfilled.
But now I am going to You, and I am saying these things while I am in the world, so that they may have My joy fulfilled within themselves.
I have given Your word to them, and the world has hated them, because they are not of the world, just as I am not of the world.
I do not petition for You to take them out of the world, but I petition for You to protect them from the evil one.
They are not of the world, just as I am not of the world.
Please sanctify them by the truth. Your word is truth.
As You sent Me into the world, so I have sent them into the world.
For their sake, I sanctify Myself, so that they too may be sanctified in truth.
I do not pray for these alone, but I also pray for those who will believe in Me through their words.
So that all of them may be one, O Father, just as You dwell in Me, and I am in You; that they may also be in Us both, so that the world may believe that You sent Me.
The glory which You entrusted to Me, I have given to them, so that they may be one as You and I are one.
I am in them, and You dwell in Me, so that they may be made complete as one, so that the world may know that You sent Me, and that You have loved them as You have loved Me.

O Father, those whom You have entrusted to Me, I desire that they be with Me where I am, so that they may see My glory which You entrusted to Me, because You loved Me before the creation of the world.
O Righteous Father, although the world does not know You, I know You, and they know that You sent Me.
I have made Your name known to them, and I will continue to make it known, so that the love with which You have loved Me may be in them, and I will be in them as well.”
